programme.title: Katavi - Africa's Fallen Paradis
programme.desc: An extreme weather phenomenon hits Katavi.Herds of hippos, lions and crocodiles living there must fight for survival and at the same time defend the territory against intruders.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: In this episode we will see animal hunters carefully preparing a battle plan.We will see that an attacker's intelligence can make the difference between victory and death.We will see, among other things, how hyenas hunt and how they deal with the leader who acted to the detriment of the herd.We will also witness a hungry cheetah trying to catch a savannah gazelle.She decides to take a desperate step - she runs away to a river full of crocodiles.They will have a feast, the big cat must enjoy it this time.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Season 7
programme.desc: Tornadoes, downpours and other dangerous weather phenomena recorded in various parts of the world will be presented.Dramatic witness recordings prove how unpredictable nature can be.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 11 Compilations
programme.desc: The adventures of Dr. Pol's team, dealing with patients of various species.From chihuahuas to chinchillas, from cows to alligators, from alpacas to camels - every animal will get help.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 11 Compilations
programme.desc: The adventures of Dr. Pol's team, dealing with patients of various species.From chihuahuas to chinchillas, from cows to alligators, from alpacas to camels - every animal will get help.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 6
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team help animals in need.In the new series, the veterinary clinic staff will face many challenges, such as creating a hoof prosthesis or helping stressed cows.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 6
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his team help animals in need.In the new series, the veterinary clinic staff will face many challenges, such as creating a hoof prosthesis or helping stressed cows.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr Pol 4
programme.sub-title: A visit from my uncle from the Netherlands
programme.desc: Dr. Pol has been treating animals for many years.He uses his knowledge and skills to help pet owners in the Michigan region.He is supported by trained colleagues.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam: Season 1
programme.sub-title: The mysterious north: the land of mountain forests
programme.desc: Let's set off on a journey through the picturesque forests and majestic mountains of northern Vietnam to reach the lush, tropical Mekong River Delta.Once there, we will begin a fascinating search for the last endemic species of local fauna and flora.Even though they are discovered only several dozen years after the end of the war, many animals are still at risk of extinction.The wildlife of the country located on the Indochinese Peninsula dynamically regenerates in times of peace, restoring the former richness of its landscape.However, rapid population growth, intensive construction development, growing climate crisis and increased tourist traffic constitute new, serious challenges for this region. We visit Vietnamese forests.In spring, you can observe a variety of butterfly species there.Animals at risk of extinction have been found in the mountainous regions of the country, such as pangolins, palm cilantroes and light-headed lutungas from Cat Ba Island.The crocodile lizard, whose presence was discovered relatively recently, immediately became an object of smuggling.Saving the white-faced lutungs turned out to be a difficult challenge.The animals were in great danger, but they managed to find refuge in a nature reserve.

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken in, among others, the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam: Season 1
programme.desc: Let's set off on a journey through the picturesque forests and majestic mountains of northern Vietnam to reach the lush, tropical Mekong River Delta.Once there, we will begin a fascinating search for the last endemic species of local fauna and flora.Even though they are discovered only several dozen years after the end of the war, many animals are still at risk of extinction.The wildlife of the country located on the Indochinese Peninsula dynamically regenerates in times of peace, restoring the former richness of its landscape.However, the rapid population growth, intensive development of construction, the growing climate crisis and increased tourist traffic constitute new, serious challenges for this region.

programme.title: One Strange Rock
programme.desc: A story about the creation and history of the planet, the laws governing it, its shape, the richness of flora and fauna, threats to the natural environment, natural wonders and surprising relationships.Actor Will Smith and people who have had the opportunity to spend time in space will talk about this extraordinary place in the universe.Accounts from astronauts including Mae Jemison, Mike Massimino, Leland Melvin and Chris Austin Hadfield will provide a completely new perspective on Earth.Director Darren Aronofsky and his film crew visited 45 countries and six continents.The photos were taken in, among others, the Arctic, the Himalayas, India and during the annual festival in Tarragona, Spain.Materials recorded on board the International Space Station were also used.In the following episodes, viewers will learn how oxygen is produced, the protective layers of the Blue Planet and the entire sequence of events that led to the creation of life.The topic of death, colonization, destruction, the search for alien forms and human intellect will also be discussed.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom: Uprising
programme.desc: The film is dedicated to a lion named Sekekama.He is the undisputed leader of the pack.However, to maintain power, he must defend his throne against his rivals.These are three eastern princes who want to rule the entire territory.They are ready to overthrow the current king, and each of them may pose a real threat to his position.A new, powerful empire is also created by the dangerous Queens of the North.Three lionesses were once expelled from the pride, and now they tirelessly plan bloody revenge on their enemies.Meanwhile, the lioness Saba struggles with a personal tragedy.At the same time, she constantly works to ensure that the only son she has will follow the path she has set.

programme.title: Death at the River
programme.desc: An exciting trip along the vibrant water arteries.Cameras record animals' fight for survival during droughts.They follow the trail of predators and giants such as elephants.

programme.title: Yellowstone Wolf Dynasty
programme.desc: The history of a controversial natural experiment - the reintroduction of wolves in Yellowstone and the history of this species in the USA.Plus, a behind-the-scenes look at the process by which the predators returned to the park.

programme.title: Asia's Killer Hornets
programme.desc: Each colony of Asian hornets comes from a single queen.It abandons its swarm to create another one.He chooses an empty place to transform into a bustling army of ruthless killers.

programme.title: Incredible Animal Journeys
programme.desc: The authors of the six-episode series recorded the migrations of wild inhabitants of various corners of the globe, who cover huge distances in search of food, shelter or a partner to extend the continuity of the species.Animals travel hundreds of kilometers along centuries-old routes, using the Earth's magnetic field, stars, the Moon, ocean currents and natural senses on land and in the sea.Most of them go on amazing journeys many times during their lives.However, the biggest challenge is the first expedition, which is the most dangerous for inexperienced people.Jeremy Renner will talk about this unique adventure.Viewers will have the chance to see the majestic processions of zebras, whose migrations are considered one of the largest land migrations on the Blue Planet.Breathtaking photos will also allow you to admire elephants trying to find water during the drought disaster.

programme.title: Incredible Animal Journeys
programme.sub-title: Behind the scenes of the program
programme.desc: The authors of the six-episode series recorded the migrations of wild inhabitants of various corners of the globe, who cover huge distances in search of food, shelter or a partner to extend the continuity of the species.Animals travel hundreds of kilometers along centuries-old routes, using the Earth's magnetic field, stars, the Moon, ocean currents and natural senses on land and in the sea.Most of them go on amazing journeys many times during their lives.However, the biggest challenge is the first expedition, which is the most dangerous for inexperienced people.Jeremy Renner will talk about this unique adventure.Viewers will have the chance to see the majestic processions of zebras, whose migrations are considered one of the largest land migrations on the Blue Planet.Breathtaking photos will also allow you to admire elephants trying to find water during the drought disaster.

programme.title: Animal Fight Club
programme.desc: Another season of the nature series that presents the brutal side of the animal world.The creators observe the behavior of the most dangerous and fierce creatures from various corners of the world.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Season 7
programme.desc: Tornadoes, downpours and other dangerous weather phenomena recorded in various parts of the world will be presented.Dramatic witness recordings prove how unpredictable nature can be.
